data.title: Hotel Giant Handing $45,000,000 To Customers After Massive Data Breaches Hit Millions of People
data.description:
A US hotel giant is preparing to pay a $45 million settlement to millions of customers affected by two massive data breaches. MGM Resorts International has reached the settlement over two breaches that hit about 37 million people in July of 2019 and September of 2023. The 2019 breach exposed sensitive data including names, addresses, […]
The post Hotel Giant Handing $45,000,000 To Customers...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/14/hotel-giant-handing-45000000-to-customers-after-massive-data-breaches-hit-millions-of-people/

data.title: Global M2 Tightens Grip On Bitcoin—What’s Next?
data.description:
Bitcoin’s tight correlation with global M2 has returned to the spotlight, suggesting that broader monetary conditions remain a key force behind the cryptocurrency’s market trajectory. Recent price action shows Bitcoin converging with M2’s downward drift—mirroring roughly a 70-day lag. This cyclical movement highlights Bitcoin’s ongoing responsiveness to fluctuations in liquidity, even as other...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/global-m2-tightens-grip-on-bitcoin-whats-next/

data.title: ZKsync sunsets liquidity program ‘Ignite’
data.description:
ZKsync has cancelled the second season of its incentive program, Ignite. Bearish market conditions among other reasons led to the move. ZKSync will distribute all remaining rewards as of March 17, 2025. ZKsync announced on Friday that it had cancelled the second season of its liquidity program, Ignite. source: https://coinjournal.net/news/zksync-sunsets-liquidity-program-ignite/

data.title: Crypto.com acquires regulatory license to offer derivatives in the United Arab Emirates
data.description:
Crypto.com revealed on March 14 that it has acquired a limited license from Dubai’s Virtual Asset Regulatory Authority to offer derivatives in the UAE. The firm also acknowledged that the new issuance extended the provisions of its existing VASP license to operate in the region.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/crypto-com-acquires-regulatory-license/
